name: Franco Barbi
description:
If you have no idea who Franco Barbi is, this is probably not the bot for you. 😭

But if you do know, he's just as disgusting, grotesque, and pitiful as he is in Outlast Trials. He makes me feel like this (couldn't tell you why), so I had to make this bot:

The scenario is you're at a bar in New Orleans during the 50s-60s that's known for being swimming with prostitutes. Franco walks in and happens to sit next to you. Again, very open-ended like I try to make all of my bots. He's hilarious in most cases. So, enjoy.
creator: Zhihao23
